creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jgh         2012-02-10 22:31:17 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    dns                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    dns/py-easyzone      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Add new port (dns/py-easyzone)
  
  Easyzone is a package to manage the common record types of a zone file,
  including SOA records. This module sits on top of the dnspython package
  and provides a higher level abstraction for common zone file manipulation
  use cases.
  
  WWW: http://www.psychofx.com/easyzone/
  
  PR:     ports/164961
  Submitted by: Attila Nagy <bra at fsn.hu>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.147     +1 -0      ports/dns/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/dns/py-easyzone/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/dns/py-easyzone/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/dns/py-easyzone/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +22 -0     ports/dns/py-easyzone/pkg-plist (new)
